_comment: Canned 'Art Loss Register Premium Search' results. The DATA is mocked; the x402 payment to reach it is real. Keyed by a loose artwork match; 'default' is the fallback.

match.summary: Object corresponds to a vase repatriated to Italy in 2008 after a documented illicit-excavation case; no longer an open claim, but provenance prior to 1971 is contested.
No matching record found in the premium stolen-art databases for the supplied artwork.
